prompt: Tap the cutoff seat in the anchor chain.
why_v1: Cutoff anchor verifies seat order before choosing action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The cutoff fixes the earlier value seat, so the line stays tied to the range that can bet before the button acts.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The anchor chain uses the cutoff here, so confirm the cutoff seat before the value action.
